body: The migration guide looks solid overall. I only found one docs consistency issue in the new README migration note.

comments.body: suggestion: I think this migration note is now out of sync with the implementation. This PR restores `twClassName="self-center"` on the internal action `Button` in `TabEmptyState` to match the legacy mobile component (https://github.com/MetaMask/metamask-mobile/blob/main/app/component-library/components-temp/TabEmptyState/TabEmptyState.tsx), but this sentence says the guide covers the removal of that class. Could we update the wording here so the README matches the actual migration story in this PR?
